composite_verdict.verdict_synthesis_rationale: Kick self-reports PASS on falsifier-coverage axis (7/7 pre-registered schema gates). However: (a) the kick is a DESIGN-ONLY ω-cycle — 0 new .hexa emitted, only 1 witness JSON; (b) beta channel ran on urandom fallback (KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU unset); (c) gamma channel ran on OFFLINE-FALLBACK (no real Gaia/sim-catalog fetch). N-9 downgrades raw PASS to WEAK-PASS to honestly surface the design/runtime gap; the kick's own 7/7 PASS verdict against its own pre-registered falsifiers stands intact at the design layer.
